input: user-item interaction graph and user-user social graph
output: ranked list of items per user
backbone: graph neural network with contrastive learning
loss: BPR loss + contrastive loss (InfoNCE) + HSIC-based kernel dependence maximization + hierarchical mutual information maximization
key_idea: maximize kernel dependence of augmented representations in Hilbert space via HSIC and hierarchical mutual information to capture nonlinear dependencies and social hierarchies
